title: Underwriting Docs RAG
summary: Search underwriting manuals, exceptions, and policy notes with grounded answers for reviewers.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Underwriting Docs RAG is positioned as a Insurtech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Search underwriting manuals, exceptions, and policy notes with grounded answers for reviewers.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on insurance, rag, docs.
